description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a baseball cap worn backwards, a zip-up jacket over a t-shirt, and fitted pants. His arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and he stands upright with feet slightly apart. The jacket appears to be lightweight and suitable for mild weather, while the pants are straight-cut and paired with athletic sneakers. The facial features are neutral, and the cap fits snugly on his head, partially covering his short hair. The overall build is average, and the clothing fits comfortably without being overly loose or tight. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the outfit is typical for everyday city environments.
description: An adult male pedestrian in casual urban clothing, including a backwards baseball cap, jacket, t-shirt, pants, and sneakers, standing with arms outstretched. The look is relaxed and suitable for city streets.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, jacket, t-shirt, pants, sneakers, and the backwards baseball cap clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the cap's brim, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, pants, shoes, and the back of the cap.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and side details of the outfit and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: casual jacket over a t-shirt, straight-cut pants, and a backwards baseball cap
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by cap
